\tzpentry{ID5651}{Phase Angle Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5651 introduces Phase Angle Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \theta_{pq} = p\lambda_i - q\lambda_p - (p-q)\varpi_i, \end{equation}
